# Promptamist

AI-Powered Prompt Management. Organize, test, and optimize your AI prompts with our intelligent platform built for power users.

## Key Features

- **Prompt Organization**: Manage all your AI prompts in one place.
- **Variable Support**: Create dynamic prompts with easy-to-use variables.
- **Testing & Optimization**: Refine your prompts for better results.
- **Secure Storage**: Your prompts are safely stored and accessible anywhere.

## Public URLs

- https://repromptamist.vercel.app - Landing page
- https://repromptamist.vercel.app/sign-in - Access your account
- https://repromptamist.vercel.app/sign-up - Create a new account

## Technical Stack

- Next.js
- Convex (Backend)
- Clerk (Authentication)
- Tailwind CSS
- Shadcn UI
